targets.rawSql: SELECT email, dept, SUM(total_tokens) AS total_tokens, SUM(total_tokens) FILTER (WHERE source='api') AS api_tokens, SUM(total_tokens) FILTER (WHERE source='subscription') AS sub_tokens, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd),2) AS cost_usd FROM usage_daily WHERE usage_date >= current_date - (${days}::int - 1) GROUP BY email, dept ORDER BY total_tokens DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT dept, SUM(total_tokens) AS total_tokens FROM usage_daily WHERE usage_date >= current_date - (${days}::int - 1) GROUP BY dept ORDER BY total_tokens DESC
SELECT tool, SUM(total_tokens) AS total_tokens FROM usage_daily WHERE usage_date >= current_date - (${days}::int - 1) GROUP BY tool ORDER BY total_tokens DESC
SELECT usage_date AS time, source AS metric, SUM(total_tokens) AS tokens FROM usage_daily WHERE usage_date >= current_date - (${days}::int - 1) GROUP BY usage_date, source ORDER BY usage_date
